observations.summary: The scene contrasts the outward beauty of the fracturing sea and sky with the terrifying, violent forces beneath, showing nature as both awe-inspiring and destructive.

left_evidence.quote: It cracked from beneath his feet outward in every direction at once—beautiful, in a terrible way—the fracture lines racing out through everything he'd trusted.
The peaceful blue bled to bruised purple.

right_evidence.quote: The sea erupted. Not weather. Something far older. A maelstrom of liquid stone and bitter brine, a churning so vast it made the previous night's dreamwalk seem like a puddle.
Waves the size of walls crashed over him. The cold stench of the deep invaded every breath. The sky above was a suffocating churning blanket of obsidian blackness that offered no exit and no stars.

bridge_evidence.quote: Visions of blue and black and white foam conspired to consume him.
